name: Herbed Beer Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the self-rising flour, sugar, grated Parmesan cheese, and dried herbs. Mix well to combine.
2. Stir in the room-temperature beer until a stiff batter forms.
3. Preheat the oven to 325°F (163°C).
4. Grease a loaf pan with shortening and sprinkle cornmeal on the bottom and sides of the pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 65 minutes at 325°F (163°C).
7. Brush the baked bread with softened butter and sprinkle additional cornmeal on top if desired.
8. Turn the bread out onto a rack to cool.
